title: Use brand logos (svgl) in the WorksWith block; drop TypeScript & Vercel
task: In the WorksWith landing section, replace the plain text stack labels with real brand SVG logos installed from the svgl shadcn registry (remotion, react, nextjs, tailwind-css, shadcnui). Install via `shadcn add @svgl/...`. Remove TypeScript and Vercel from the lineup.

stories.title: Install svgl logo components
acceptanceCriteria: shadcn add installs remotion, react, nextjs, tailwind-css, shadcnui svg components into components/ui/svgs/
Each installed file exports a usable React SVG component (default or named) accepting SVGProps

stories.title: Render brand logos in WorksWith; remove TypeScript & Vercel
acceptanceCriteria: WorksWith renders the 5 svgl brand logos (Remotion, React, Next.js, Tailwind, shadcn/ui) instead of plain text
TypeScript and Vercel are no longer present in the WorksWith lineup
Logos are sized/colored consistently with the muted->foreground hover treatment and remain accessible (aria-label or sr-only label)
config/landing.ts STACK no longer references TypeScript/Vercel (or WorksWith no longer depends on it for those)
No unused imports; component compiles (no TS errors on changed files)
